def test_rstan_package_installed():
        """Test that RStan package is properly installed."""
        try:
            result = subprocess.run(
                ["R", "--slave", "-e", "library(rstan); packageVersion('rstan')"],
                capture_output=True,
                text=True,
                timeout=60,
            )
